resources.string: Import and camera flows will start here. This placeholder defines the product entry point before OCR and parsing arrive.
Photo Picker and files import will land here first so OCR can be built without camera complexity.
CameraX capture will follow as a dedicated slice once the import path is stable.
Saved receipts, thumbnails, totals, and detail navigation will live here after local persistence is added.
This screen will show local receipt history with thumbnails, merchant names, dates, and totals.
The next product slice will add detail navigation, preview images, and delete actions.
Defaults for currency, image handling, and local storage behavior will be configured here once persistence exists.
Default currency and import behavior will become the first real settings values.
Later this area will explain local storage usage and image cleanup behavior.
